name: bip-project
description: Yii2 project with code quality tools

scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:js:types && npm run lint:php && npm run lint:phpcs && npm run lint:phpstan
scripts.lint:changed: bash -c 'BASE=${LINT_BASE:-HEAD}; (git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR "$BASE" HEAD; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR) | grep -E "\\.(js|php)$" | grep -v "web/js/third-party/" | sort -u | while read file; do echo "Checking: $file"; if [[ $file == *.js ]]; then eslint --fix "$file" && tsc --noEmit "$file"; elif [[ $file == *.php ]]; then vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix --config=.php-cs-fixer.php "$file" && vendor/bin/phpcs "$file" && vendor/bin/phpstan analyse "$file"; fi; done'
